name: telemetry baseline: pre-commit hook blocks adding a skill/agent file lacking budget_impact_estimate when project has telemetry-baseline pinned
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro skills/new && printf 'name: new\ndescription: x\n' > skills/new/SKILL.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/lock.sh" --init && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/init-guardrails.sh" --emit-baseline "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/telemetry-baseline.json" && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/lock.sh" --pin-baseline && echo '{"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"skills/new/SKILL.md"}}' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/budget-impact-gate.sh"
